# IPTV UPG
> Last updated: 2026-05-11

> IPTV UPG is a premium IPTV streaming service providing 24,000+ live TV channels and 120,000+ movies and series in 4K/UHD quality. Plans start at $7.50/month. 99.9% server uptime. Instant activation. 7-day money-back guarantee.

IPTV UPG (https://www.iptvupg.com) delivers Internet Protocol Television (IPTV) subscriptions to customers worldwide. The service is operated in English and Romanian. Contact: +44 7848 197761 | support@iptvupg.com

## What Is IPTV UPG?

IPTV UPG is an IPTV subscription provider founded to offer affordable, high-quality live TV and video-on-demand streaming without traditional cable contracts. Subscribers receive a username and password to stream content on any compatible device via the M3U/Xtream Codes protocol. Unlike cable TV, which typically offers 150-300 channels for $80-$120/month, IPTV UPG delivers 24,000+ channels from 190+ countries for as low as $7.50/month — a 53% savings compared to monthly billing. The service uses adaptive bitrate streaming technology that automatically adjusts video quality based on real-time network conditions, preventing the freeze-then-buffer cycle common with fixed-bitrate IPTV providers.

## Key Facts

- **Live Channels:** 24,000+ channels from 190+ countries (sports, entertainment, news, kids, international)
- **VOD Library:** 120,000+ movies and TV series updated daily
- **Video Quality:** HD (1080p) and 4K/UHD; adaptive bitrate prevents buffering
- **Uptime:** 99.9% server uptime with anti-freeze technology
- **Simultaneous Connections:** 2 devices per subscription
- **Activation:** Instant — credentials delivered within minutes of payment
- **EPG:** Full Electronic Program Guide included
- **Trial:** Free trial available — no credit card required (contact via WhatsApp)
- **Guarantee:** 7-day money-back guarantee on all plans
- **Payment Methods:** Visa, Mastercard, Cryptocurrency
- **Languages Supported:** English, Romanian
- **Support:** 24/7 via WhatsApp, email, and live chat

## Pricing Plans (USD)

| Plan | Total Price | Effective Monthly Rate |
|------|------------|------------------------|
| 1 Month | $16.00 | $16.00/mo |
| 3 Months | $39.00 | $13.00/mo |
| 6 Months | $60.00 | $10.00/mo |
| 12 Months (Best Value) | $90.00 | $7.50/mo |

All plans include: 24,000+ live channels, 120,000+ VOD, HD & 4K quality, Full EPG, 2 device connections, 24/7 support, and instant activation. The annual plan saves 53% versus monthly billing.

## Compatible Devices

IPTV UPG works on all major streaming devices. No additional hardware is required beyond what users already own.

- Smart TVs: Samsung (Tizen), LG (webOS), Sony
- Streaming Sticks: Amazon Fire TV Stick, Roku
- Mobile: Android smartphones and tablets, iPhone and iPad (iOS)
- Computers: Windows PC, macOS
- Set-Top Boxes: MAG boxes, Formuler devices
- Streaming Boxes: Apple TV, Android TV boxes

Device-specific setup guides: [macOS](https://www.iptvupg.com/macos-iptv) | [Android](https://www.iptvupg.com/android-iptv) | [Roku](https://www.iptvupg.com/roku-iptv) | [Samsung TV](https://www.iptvupg.com/samsung-tv-iptv) | [LG TV](https://www.iptvupg.com/lg-tv-iptv) | [Fire TV](https://www.iptvupg.com/fire-tv-iptv) | [MAG Box](https://www.iptvupg.com/mag-iptv) | [Apple TV](https://www.iptvupg.com/apple-tv-iptv)

## How to Get Started

1. Choose a subscription plan at https://www.iptvupg.com/#packages
2. Complete payment (Visa, Mastercard, or crypto)
3. Receive login credentials via email within minutes
4. Install a compatible IPTV app on your device and enter credentials
5. Start streaming 24,000+ channels immediately

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How many channels does IPTV UPG have?**
IPTV UPG provides 24,000+ live TV channels from 190+ countries, including premium sports, entertainment, news, and kids content in HD and 4K quality. The channel lineup is updated regularly as new broadcasters are added, and a full Electronic Program Guide (EPG) is included so you always know what's on.

**What internet speed is required for 4K streaming?**
4K/UHD streams require a minimum 25 Mbps sustained connection. HD (1080p) runs reliably at 10 Mbps. The adaptive bitrate system automatically adjusts stream quality during network congestion, then restores full resolution within seconds. A wired Ethernet connection provides the most stable 4K experience, though modern Wi-Fi 5 and Wi-Fi 6 networks work well too.

**Is a free trial available?**
Yes. A free trial is available with no credit card required. Contact IPTV UPG via WhatsApp at +44 7848 197761 to start instantly. During the trial you get access to all 24,000+ live channels and the complete VOD library in full HD and 4K quality.

**Can I use IPTV UPG on multiple devices?**
All plans include 2 simultaneous device connections. You can watch live TV on your Samsung TV while someone else streams on their iPhone or Fire Stick at the same time. Custom multi-connection plans are available by contacting support.

**How much does IPTV UPG cost?**
Plans start at $7.50/month with the annual plan ($90/year). Monthly is $16, 3-month is $39, and 6-month is $60. All plans include a 7-day money-back guarantee. We accept Visa, Mastercard, and cryptocurrency payments.

**What makes IPTV UPG different from cable TV?**
IPTV UPG offers 24,000+ channels versus 150-300 for standard cable, costs $7.50-$16/month versus $80-$120/month for cable, and activates instantly without technician visits or hardware contracts. The adaptive bitrate streaming technology prevents buffering by automatically adjusting quality based on network conditions.

## Author

IPTV UPG editorial content is researched and maintained by the IPTV UPG support and engineering team — operators who run the streaming infrastructure end-to-end (channel ingestion, EPG curation, anti-freeze CDN tuning, and customer onboarding). Pricing, channel counts, and uptime figures published on this site reflect production metrics observed in the team's own monitoring dashboards rather than marketing aspirations. Editorial review for accuracy is performed monthly. Corrections or technical questions: support@iptvupg.com.
